home.title: Select a Service
home.description: Choose which service you want to download from.

unified.pageDescription: Paste a link or share token, click Parse, and choose a download option after auto-detection. Supports Bilibili video and audio, Douyin videos, WeChat article videos, Niconico video and audio, Instagram reels, posts, and image posts, Xiaohongshu videos and image notes, TikTok videos, and X videos.
unified.placeholder: Paste link or share token here...

page.feedback: Have feedback or suggestions? Click the "Feedback" button in the top-right corner.
page.copyrightVideo: Copyright Notice: Video copyrights belong to relevant websites and authors
page.copyrightStorage: This site does not provide or store any videos or images
page.copyrightBilibiliRestriction: ⚠️ Downloading copyright-restricted videos (such as member-exclusive or paid content) is not supported.

errors.downloadError: An unknown error occurred during processing.
errors.getVideoInfoFailed: Failed to get video information, please try again later.
errors.clipboardPermission: Please check if clipboard permission is granted.
errors.allImagesLoadFailed: All images failed to load, unable to package download
errors.confirmPartialDownload: {failCount} images failed to load. Download remaining {successCount} images?
errors.fileTooLarge: File is too large, maximum 500MB supported
errors.videoFileTooLarge: Video file is too large, maximum 500MB supported
errors.audioFileTooLarge: Audio file is too large, maximum 100MB supported
errors.fileEmpty: File is empty, please select a valid file
errors.fileFormatNotSupported: File format not supported, please upload MP4/WebM/MOV/MKV/AVI/MPEG video
errors.audioFormatNotSupported: Audio format not supported, please upload MP3/AAC/WAV/OGG/FLAC/M4A audio
errors.fileReadFailed: Failed to read file, please try again

api.INVALID_JSON: The request body format is invalid.
api.PLATFORM_MISMATCH: The link does not match the selected download interface.
api.NOT_FOUND: The resource does not exist or is no longer available.
api.DOWNLOAD_URL_NOT_FOUND: No downloadable media link was found.
api.RATE_LIMITED: Too many requests. Please try again later.
api.UPSTREAM_ERROR: The upstream platform request failed. Please try again later.
api.MEDIA_PROCESSOR_INIT_FAILED: Failed to initialize the media processor.
api.PARSE_FAILED: Failed to parse the link. Please check whether it is valid.

metadata.title: Universal Media Downloader - Download Media from Bilibili, Douyin, WeChat, Niconico, Instagram, Xiaohongshu, TikTok, and X
metadata.description: Free online universal media downloader. Download Bilibili video and audio, Douyin videos, WeChat article videos, Niconico video and audio, Instagram reels, posts, and image posts, Xiaohongshu videos and image notes, TikTok videos, and X videos in one click.
metadata.keywords: online media downloader,Bilibili video downloader,Bilibili audio downloader,Douyin video downloader,WeChat video downloader,WeChat article video downloader,Niconico video downloader,Niconico audio downloader,Instagram reels downloader,Instagram post downloader,Instagram image post downloader,Xiaohongshu video downloader,Xiaohongshu image note downloader,TikTok video downloader,X video downloader
metadata.ogTitle: Universal Media Downloader - Free Online Tool
metadata.ogDescription: Professional universal media downloader. Auto-detect links and download Bilibili video/audio, Douyin videos, WeChat article videos, Niconico video/audio, Instagram reels, posts, and image posts, Xiaohongshu videos and image notes, TikTok videos, and X videos in one click.

contactPage.metaDescription: Contact Universal Media Downloader for support, bug reports, feature requests, and SEO feedback.
contactPage.title: Contact
contactPage.intro: Use the channels below to report issues or request new features.
contactPage.githubHint: Best for bug reports and feature requests.

privacyPage.metaDescription: How Universal Media Downloader handles data, browser storage, analytics, and privacy protection.
privacyPage.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPage.intro: This page explains what data is processed when using the downloader.
points: Download history is stored in your browser local storage.
The service does not store your private media files on this website.
Third-party services such as analytics or ads may collect usage data according to their own policies.

termsPage.metaTitle: Terms of Use | Universal Media Downloader
termsPage.metaDescription: Usage terms, legal limitations, and user responsibilities for Universal Media Downloader.
termsPage.title: Terms of Use
termsPage.intro: By using this service, you agree to follow applicable copyright and platform rules.
points: Use the tool only for lawful and authorized content access.
Do not use the service to bypass payment, membership, or copyright protection.
You are responsible for how downloaded files are used.
The service may change functionality at any time without prior notice.

douyin.apiLimitDownload: If automatic download fails, please click open link to download manually (download feature is in the bottom right corner of the video)

extractAudio.errorLoad: Failed to load audio processor, please refresh and try again
extractAudio.errorDownload: Failed to download video, please use backup link and extract with other tools
extractAudio.errorConvert: Audio conversion failed, video format may not be supported
extractAudio.errorMemory: Video file too large, browser memory insufficient, please use desktop tools

audioTool.title: Audio Tools
audioTool.description: Extract audio or merge media files. Download starts automatically when processing finishes.
audioTool.extractDescription: Extract audio from a local video file and output MP3.
audioTool.mergeDescription: Choose one video file and one audio file, then output MP4.
audioTool.placeholder: Paste a video or post share link...
audioTool.strategyHint: Prefer native platform audio download; if unavailable, browser extraction will be used automatically.
audioTool.statusIdle: Select a video file to start extraction
audioTool.statusMergeIdle: Select both video and audio files to start merging
audioTool.statusFallbackExtracting: Native audio not found, preparing browser extraction...
audioTool.noAudioSource: Parsed successfully, but no available audio or video source was found
audioTool.dropHint: Drop a file here, or click to select
audioTool.statusFileReady: Video ready. You can start extraction

title.en: How to download content from Bilibili, Douyin, WeChat, Niconico, Instagram, Xiaohongshu, TikTok, and X
title.zh: 如何下载哔哩哔哩、抖音、微信公众号、Instagram、小红书、TikTok 和 X 内容
title.zh-tw: 如何下載嗶哩嗶哩、抖音、微信公眾號、Instagram、小紅書、TikTok 與 X 內容
title.ja: Bilibili・Douyin・WeChat・Niconico・Instagram・Xiaohongshu・TikTok・X のコンテンツをダウンロードする方法

en.name: Copy link
en.text: Copy the video, post, image-post, or article link from Bilibili, Douyin, WeChat, Niconico, Instagram, Xiaohongshu, TikTok, or X

en.name: Paste link
en.text: Paste the link into the input field on our website

en.name: Auto-detect
en.text: The tool will automatically detect the platform (Bilibili/Douyin/WeChat/Niconico/Instagram/Xiaohongshu/TikTok/X)

en.name: Download
en.text: Choose video, audio, or image download options to get your media content

zh.name: 复制链接
zh.text: 从浏览器复制哔哩哔哩、抖音、微信公众号文章、Instagram、小红书、TikTok 或 X 的视频、帖子或图文链接

zh.name: 粘贴链接
zh.text: 将链接粘贴到网站的输入框中

zh.name: 自动识别
zh.text: 工具会自动识别平台（哔哩哔哩/抖音/微信公众号/Instagram/小红书/TikTok/X）

zh.name: 下载
zh.text: 选择视频、音频或图片下载选项，获取对应内容

zh-tw.name: 複製連結
zh-tw.text: 從瀏覽器複製嗶哩嗶哩、抖音、微信公眾號文章、Instagram、小紅書、TikTok 或 X 的影片、貼文或圖文連結

zh-tw.name: 貼上連結
zh-tw.text: 將連結貼上到網站的輸入框中

zh-tw.name: 自動識別
zh-tw.text: 工具會自動識別平台（嗶哩嗶哩/抖音/微信公眾號/Instagram/小紅書/TikTok/X）

zh-tw.name: 下載
zh-tw.text: 選擇影片、音訊或圖片下載選項，取得對應內容

ja.name: リンクをコピー
ja.text: Bilibili、Douyin、WeChat、Instagram、Xiaohongshu、TikTok、または X の動画・投稿・画像投稿・記事リンクをコピーします

ja.text: サイト上の入力欄にリンクを貼り付けます

ja.name: 自動判別
ja.text: ツールがプラットフォームを自動で判別します（Bilibili / Douyin / WeChat / Instagram / Xiaohongshu / TikTok / X）

ja.name: ダウンロード
